# Central Park Flower Valley - The Selene Tower

> Central Park Selene Tower is a G+25 high-rise tower by Central Park Group (St. Patricks Realty Pvt. Ltd. / Bakshi Group) within the 500-acre Flower Valley township in Sector 32, Sohna, Gurugram, Haryana. The tower comprises 353 Studio and 1 BHK serviced residences plus 38 high-street retail units (391 total). Standard units range from 1,100 to 1,959 sq ft; select residences up to 3,600 sq ft. Starting price Rs 2.31 Crore onwards. Floors 0-2 feature luxury retail and a food court. The tower includes a 60,000 sq ft clubhouse with rooftop pool, cricket stadium, horse stable, and golf driving range. Possession: June 30, 2030. RERA: RC/REP/HARERA/GGM/964/696/2025/67.

## Key Facts

- **Project name**: Central Park Flower Valley - The Selene Tower
- **Developer brand**: Central Park Group
- **Legal entity**: St. Patricks Realty Pvt. Ltd. (Central Park / Bakshi Group)
- **Location**: Sector 32, Sohna, Gurugram, Haryana (within 500-acre Flower Valley township)
- **Product type**: High-rise tower (G+25)
- **Configurations**: Studio apartments + 1 BHK serviced residences (NOT 3/4 BHK)
- **Unit sizes**: Standard 1,100 - 1,959 sq ft; select residences up to 3,600 sq ft
- **Starting price**: Rs 2.31 Crore onwards
- **Serviced residences**: 353
- **Retail units**: 38 high-street retail outlets
- **Total units**: 391 (353 residential + 38 retail)
- **Floors**: G+25 (~17 residences per level from floor 4)
- **Commercial**: Floors 0-2 are luxury retail + food court
- **RERA number**: RC/REP/HARERA/GGM/964/696/2025/67
- **RERA authority**: Haryana Real Estate Regulatory Authority (HARERA)
- **Possession**: June 30, 2030
- **Clubhouse**: 60,000 sq ft
- **Payment plan**: Indicative 30:30:40 (30% booking, 30% construction-linked, 40% possession)
- **Part of**: Flower Valley Township (~500 acres, Sectors 32-33, Sohna)
- **Contact**: +91 94122 34688
- **Official site**: https://centralparkselene.com/
- **Developer site**: https://www.centralpark.in/

## Location & Connectivity

- On Gurgaon-Sohna Elevated Corridor
- ~5 minutes from KMP Expressway
- Close to Delhi-Mumbai Expressway
- ~12 minutes from Rajiv Chowk, Gurugram (~12 km)
- ~40 minutes from Indira Gandhi International Airport

## Amenities

Rooftop swimming pool, 60,000 sq ft clubhouse, cricket stadium, horse stable, golf driving range, spa and wellness centre, smart home features, 24/7 concierge service, fine dining restaurants, sports arenas, yoga zones, gym, landscaped gardens, 5-tier security system, dedicated stilt car parking, children's play areas, jogging tracks, meditation garden.

## Residence Specifications

- **Studio Apartments**: Compact luxury serviced residences with modern finishes, smart home features, and 24/7 concierge service. Ideal for professionals and investors.
- **1 BHK Serviced Residences**: Spacious 1 BHK units ranging from 1,100 to 1,959 sq ft with imported flooring, modular kitchen, branded air conditioning, and full-service living amenities. Select residences up to 3,600 sq ft.

## Commercial Podium

Floors 0-2 of The Selene Tower house 38 high-street retail outlets and a curated food court, bringing convenience and lifestyle right to residents' doorstep. Residents enjoy direct access to premium shopping, dining, and entertainment without leaving the building.

## About Central Park Group

Central Park Group (legal entity: St. Patricks Realty Pvt. Ltd., Bakshi Group) is a leading Delhi-NCR real estate developer with nearly two decades of excellence. Known for luxury residences and 5-star hospitality services, the group has developed landmark projects including Central Park Resorts, Central Park Belgravia, and the flagship 500-acre Flower Valley township in Sohna. The group's philosophy centres on timeless design, unmatched quality, and lifestyle experiences that exceed expectations.

## Part of Flower Valley Township

The Selene Tower is located within Central Park Flower Valley, a massive ~500-acre integrated township spanning Sectors 32-33, Sohna, Gurugram. The township includes independent floors, plots, villas, and now The Selene Tower high-rise. Flower Valley offers a self-sustained ecosystem with schools, hospitals, commercial zones, and extensive green landscapes.

## Important Distinction

- **The Selene Tower** (this page): Studio + 1 BHK serviced residences in a G+25 high-rise, starting Rs 2.31 Cr. 353 residential units + 38 retail units.
- **Central Park Flower Valley** (parent township): Includes independent floors, plots, and villas in 3/4 BHK configurations -- these are separate products, NOT part of The Selene Tower.

## Disclaimer

Information is indicative and subject to change. Prices, sizes, and specifications should be verified on the HARERA portal (haryanarera.gov.in) before booking. Developed by St. Patricks Realty Pvt. Ltd. (Central Park / Bakshi Group). RERA: RC/REP/HARERA/GGM/964/696/2025/67. Payment plan (30:30:40) is indicative.
